channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Ex-US Attorney Refused Questions On Trump's Role In Epstein Probe: Democrats

media:content.media:description: Democrats and some Republicans accused Bondi of trying to shield Trump from scrutiny.

item.description: In a closed-door interview before the House of Representatives Oversight Committee on Friday, Bondi also said Todd Blanche, who now serves as acting attorney general, had been responsible for the documents' release. Eps
item.content:encoded: In a closed-door interview before the House of Representatives Oversight Committee on Friday, Bondi also said Todd Blanche, who now serves as acting attorney general, had been responsible for the documents' release. Eps

item.title: Iran Preparing "Grand' Funeral For Ex-Supreme Leader Ayatollah Khamenei: Report

media:content.media:description: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei killed in US-Iran stikes on February 28.

item.description: Khamenei, who led the Islamic republic for more than three decades, was killed in the first wave of US-Israeli strikes that launched the war on February 28.
item.content:encoded: Khamenei, who led the Islamic republic for more than three decades, was killed in the first wave of US-Israeli strikes that launched the war on February 28.

item.title: 3 Chinese Astronauts Return To Earth After Spending 7 Months In Space

media:content.media:description: As China steps up its space program, its astronauts have carried out multiple missions.

item.description: The craft carrying Zhang Lu, Wu Fei and Zhang Hongzhang of the Shenzhou 21 crew touched down at the Dongfeng landing site in north China's Inner Mongolia region in the evening.
item.content:encoded: The craft carrying Zhang Lu, Wu Fei and Zhang Hongzhang of the Shenzhou 21 crew touched down at the Dongfeng landing site in north China's Inner Mongolia region in the evening.

item.title: "Fear Is Slaughtering Us": In War-Torn Gaza, Child Marriages Rise Sharply

media:content.media:description: Some parents have sought some financial stability for their daughters by giving them away in marriage.

item.description: The devastation that Israel's campaign has wreaked in Gaza has helped fuel an increase in marriages of young girls.
item.content:encoded: The devastation that Israel's campaign has wreaked in Gaza has helped fuel an increase in marriages of young girls.

item.title: US Sees India As A 'New Centre Of Power', Says Envoy Sergio Gor

media:content.media:description: Gor focused on areas where cooperation between the two countries continues to grow

item.description: Sergio Gor, a key Trump ally and envoy, described India as one of the "new centres of powers" that Washington is actively trying to engage.
item.content:encoded: Sergio Gor, a key Trump ally and envoy, described India as one of the "new centres of powers" that Washington is actively trying to engage.

item.title: Kazakhstan Offers To Take Iran's Uranium Stockpile: Report

media:content.media:description: Iran has insisted on its right to maintain a nuclear programme.

item.description: The Financial Times said the Kazakh leader had expressed his country's "openness" to store the stockpile enriched to near weapons grade level.
item.content:encoded: The Financial Times said the Kazakh leader had expressed his country's "openness" to store the stockpile enriched to near weapons grade level.

item.title: US Judge Temporarily Blocks Trump's $1.8 Billion "Anti-Weaponisation" Fund

media:content.media:description: The fund has generated a fierce backlash since it was announced last week.

item.description: US District Judge Leonie Brinkema also barred the government from moving forward with the fund's creation while litigation is pending to challenge it.
item.content:encoded: US District Judge Leonie Brinkema also barred the government from moving forward with the fund's creation while litigation is pending to challenge it.

item.title: Bus Rams 6 Cars On Virginia Highway, 5 Killed, 34 Injured

media:content.media:description: The crash is under investigation and charges are pending, police said.

item.description: All five of the people who died were in vehicles hit by the bus, and three of the injured are in critical condition, police said.
item.content:encoded: All five of the people who died were in vehicles hit by the bus, and three of the injured are in critical condition, police said.

item.title: "Mix Of Truth And Lies": Iran Counters Trump Claims On Reopening Hormuz

media:content.media:description: Iranian sources said destruction of Iran's nuclear material is also not included.

item.description: Trump took to his Truth Social platform earlier to say he was preparing to make a final decision on whether or not to strike a peace deal with Iran.
item.content:encoded: Trump took to his Truth Social platform earlier to say he was preparing to make a final decision on whether or not to strike a peace deal with Iran.

item.title: Hormuz Is Shut, Indian Ships Still Passing. Centre Shares 'Secret' Strategy

media:content.media:description: 13 Indian-flagged vessels are currently in the Strait of Hormuz region

item.description: The movement is significant because Iran holds a major geographical advantage over the Strait and has repeatedly targeted vessels in retaliation for the US-Israeli strikes on February 28 that triggered the war.
item.content:encoded: The movement is significant because Iran holds a major geographical advantage over the Strait and has repeatedly targeted vessels in retaliation for the US-Israeli strikes on February 28 that triggered the war.

item.title: "Say Hello To Your Wives," Trump Says Strait Of Hormuz Blockade To Be Lifted

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump is expected to take a decision shortly.

item.description: Trump also specified that enriched uranium stockpiles in Iran "will be unearthed by the United States".
item.content:encoded: Trump also specified that enriched uranium stockpiles in Iran "will be unearthed by the United States".

item.title: Iran War LIVE Updates: Ships In Hormuz May Start Process Of "Heading Home": Trump
item.description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz
item.content:encoded: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: 1,600 Strikes, 500 Drone Attacks: The 'Illusion' Of Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire

media:content.media:description: IDF have conducted nearly 1,600 strikes across different parts of Lebanon

item.description: Since its announcement by the US, Israel and Hezbollah have traded heavy fire, and Israeli forces have continued to demolish villages in southern Lebanon.
item.content:encoded: Since its announcement by the US, Israel and Hezbollah have traded heavy fire, and Israeli forces have continued to demolish villages in southern Lebanon.

item.title: "Get Ready," Russia Tells Romania To Brace For More Drone Incidents

media:content.media:description: A Russian drone had crashed into an apartment block in Romania.

item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin had been informed about the drone incident in Romania, the TASS state news agency reported earlier on Friday.
item.content:encoded: Russian President Vladimir Putin had been informed about the drone incident in Romania, the TASS state news agency reported earlier on Friday.

item.title: "They Walk Among Us": White House Launches "Aliens" Website. What It's About

media:content.media:description: The website states only one man "had the courage to tell the truth"

item.description: The website is called Aliens.gov and is a space-themed immigration enforcement website that features a US map tracking "alien arrests". The data on the site will be updated and will also be included in the White House app.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1106018/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The website is called Aliens.gov and is a space-themed immigration enforcement website that features a US map tracking "alien arrests". The data on the site will be updated and will also be included in the White House app.

item.title: Mini-Pigs To Organ Printing, Putin's $26 Billion Anti-Ageing Plan: Report

media:content.media:description: Putin's obsession with longevity has been seen through visuals of him playing ice hockey, exercising.

item.description: Achievements so far include bioprinted human cartilage tissue and a mouse thyroid gland, and the long-term goal is human organ replacement by the end of the decade.
item.content:encoded: Achievements so far include bioprinted human cartilage tissue and a mouse thyroid gland, and the long-term goal is human organ replacement by the end of the decade.

item.title: Russian Drone Attack In Romania Injures 2, Sparks NATO, EU Outrage

media:content.media:description: A drone hit an apartment building in NATO-member Romania early Friday.

item.description: The drone smashed into an apartment building in Galati, close to the border with Ukraine, sparking a fire and sending a 14-year-old boy and 53-year-old woman to hospital with injuries
item.content:encoded: The drone smashed into an apartment building in Galati, close to the border with Ukraine, sparking a fire and sending a 14-year-old boy and 53-year-old woman to hospital with injuries

item.title: Myanmar President To Visit India, Trade And Defence On Agenda

media:content.media:description: India's engagement with Myanmar since the April 2026 transition has been active

item.description: Initially scheduled to visit India to participate in the International Big Cat Alliance Summit on 1 June (since deferred), Min Aung Hlaing will now pay an official visit to India from 30 May to 03 June 2026 at the invitation of Prime Minister Narendra Modi.
item.content:encoded: Initially scheduled to visit India to participate in the International Big Cat Alliance Summit on 1 June (since deferred), Min Aung Hlaing will now pay an official visit to India from 30 May to 03 June 2026 at the invitation of Prime Minister Narendra Modi.

item.title: Canadian Man Plants Over 47,000 Mangrove Trees In 24 Hours, Sets World Record

media:content.media:description: Mangrove trees are considered crucial in protecting coastal areas.

item.description: Antoine achieved this record in the coastal city of Mombasa, Kenya, where he planted thousands of mangrove trees within 24 hours.
item.content:encoded: Antoine achieved this record in the coastal city of Mombasa, Kenya, where he planted thousands of mangrove trees within 24 hours.

item.title: How Mount Bental Acts As Israel's Fortress On Syrian Frontier, NDTV Reports

media:content.media:description: Tourist lookout point at an Israeli army outpost on Mount Bental

item.description: As the conflict landscape in the Middle East expands, Mount Bental is no longer just a disputed hilltop. It has become a live military vantage point from where Israel is preparing for the possibility of a broader regional confrontation.
item.content:encoded: As the conflict landscape in the Middle East expands, Mount Bental is no longer just a disputed hilltop. It has become a live military vantage point from where Israel is preparing for the possibility of a broader regional confrontation.
